title: Parameters for autoware_tensorrt_oneplanner
$comment: This schema is not considered in CI workflow. See https://github.com/autowarefoundation/autoware.universe/pull/8205#issuecomment-2255074224.

plugins_path.description: Path to the TensorRT plugins (spconv ops) required by the BEV encoder.

bev_encoder.description: BEVFusion LiDAR-branch encoder (up to the SECOND-FPN neck).

onnx_path.description: Path to the BEV encoder ONNX model.

engine_path.description: Path to the cached BEV encoder TensorRT engine.

trt_precision.description: TensorRT precision of the BEV encoder engine.

planner.description: Diffusion-planner head conditioned on the BEV feature map.

onnx_path.description: Path to the planner head ONNX model (sampling loop unrolled).

args_path.description: Path to the normalization-statistics JSON exported with the model.

densification_world_frame_id.description: World frame used to densify (ego-motion compensate) past LiDAR sweeps.

densification_num_past_frames.description: Number of past LiDAR frames concatenated into the current sweep.

cloud_capacity.description: Capacity of the point-cloud buffer (>= the maximum expected number of points).

max_points_per_voxel.description: Maximum number of points accumulated per voxel.

voxels_num.description: TensorRT optimization profile for the voxel count, [min, opt, max].

point_cloud_range.description: Point-cloud crop range [x_min, y_min, z_min, x_max, y_max, z_max] (m). Must match training.

voxel_size.description: Voxel size [x, y, z] (m). Must match training.

out_size_factor.description: Downsample factor from the voxel grid to the BEV feature map.

bev_feature_channels.description: Channel count of the BEV feature map produced by the encoder.

use_intensity.description: If true, points are 5-dim (x, y, z, intensity, time_lag); else 4-dim. Must match the checkpoint.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature of the diffusion planner (0 = deterministic).

velocity_smoothing_window.description: Moving-average window (in trajectory points) used to smooth the longitudinal velocity.

stopping_threshold.description: Speed below which the trajectory is treated as stopping (m/s).

turn_indicator_keep_offset.description: Longitudinal offset (m) from which a predicted turn indicator is kept.

turn_indicator_hold_duration.description: Minimum duration (s) a turn-indicator command is held.

shift_x.description: Whether to shift the ego frame by the rear-axle to base-link offset along x.

delay_step.description: Number of trajectory steps dropped from the start to compensate for inference/actuation delay.

line_string_max_step_m.description: Maximum spacing (m) when resampling lanelet line strings for the planner input.

use_time_interpolation.description: Whether to time-interpolate the output trajectory onto a uniform time grid.

traffic_light_group_msg_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout (s) after which a traffic-light-group message is considered stale.
